prompts.name: 墨西哥卷饼食材分解图 | 新鲜美食摄影
prompts.content:
同一款墨西哥卷饼的爆炸分解视图，呈现为干净的、商业食谱风格的分解图。
恰好五种食材，与第一张图片匹配，从上到下垂直排列，均匀分布，完美对齐。

食材顺序（从上到下）：

新鲜番茄莎莎酱 — 40克

切达奶酪丝 — 30克

烤鸡肉块 — 80克

爽脆生菜 — 25克

软质小麦卷饼皮 — 60克（底部基底）

为每种食材添加清晰的信息图风格标注。
每个标注包含食材名称及其精确重量（克），按照上述内容精确书写。

标注设计指南：
– 干净的无衬线字体，中等粗细
– 文字放置在简约的框架或方框内
– 细长精确的连接线直接指向每种食材
– 高可读性，无重叠，无过度装饰
– 结构化垂直布局，类似现代食谱卡片

背景浅色、中性，优化文字清晰度和视觉整洁度。
整体风格简约、说明性强、商业感，适用于营销、解说视觉和产品分解展示。
prompts.author: 𝐌
prompts.nameEn: Taco Ingredients Breakdown | Fresh Food Photography
prompts.contentEn:
Exploded view of the same taco, presented as a clean, commercial recipe-style breakdown.
Exactly five ingredients, matching the first image, separated and arranged vertically from top to bottom, evenly spaced and perfectly aligned.

Ingredient order (top → bottom):

Fresh tomato salsa — 40 g

Shredded cheddar cheese — 30 g

Grilled chicken pieces — 80 g

Crisp lettuce — 25 g

Soft wheat taco tortilla — 60 g (bottom base)

Add clear infographic-style annotations for each ingredient.
Each annotation includes the ingredient name and its exact weight in grams, written exactly as listed above.

Annotation design guidelines:
– Clean sans-serif font, medium weight
– Text placed inside minimal frames or boxes
– Thin, precise connector lines pointing directly to each ingredient
– High readability, no overlap, no decorative excess
– Structured vertical layout, like a modern recipe card

Background is light, neutral, and optimized for text clarity and visual cleanliness.
Overall style is minimal, instructional, and commercial, suitable for marketing, explainer visuals, and product breakdowns.

prompts.name: 麦当劳快餐俯拍 | 社交媒体广告
prompts.content:
探索 Nano Banana Pro 的更多潜力。将品牌转化为令人驻足的视觉作品。

使用 Nano Banana Pro 在 @higgsfield_ai 生成

- 提示词
超广角超写实俯拍平铺摄影。四位真人围坐在方桌旁。镜头大幅后退，在人物和桌子周围留出大量负空间（空旷地面区域），确保构图干净简洁。场景风格为 [VIBE & ATTIRE]：四人穿着 [CLOTHING STYLE]。他们的互动具体为：[DESCRIBE ACTION OF EACH PERSON]。

桌子是定制的实物道具，设计成 Instagram 帖子的样子：仅在上边缘和下边缘有实心白色条带（左右两侧无白色边框）。
- 顶部白条上有绘制的头像图片 [LOGO DESCRIPTION]、用户名 "[USERNAME]" 后面跟着一个蓝色验证小图标，右侧是 "..."。
- 底部白条上有绘制的红色爱心、评论和分享图标在左侧，最右侧是 "收藏" 图标。

桌子中心涂成 [EXACT CENTER COLOR & HEX CODE]。桌上的物品为 [FOOD/OBJECTS DESCRIPTION]。
重要提示：所有食物、饮品、物品以及与之互动的手都必须严格限制在中心 [COLOR] 涂装区域内。任何东西都不得延伸到白色条带上或超出桌子边界。地面背景为 [FLOOR COLOR]，以创造视觉分离。专业工作室灯光配合明显的落影。8K，清晰对焦。
prompts.author: ΛRMIN | AI
prompts.nameEn: McDonald's Fast Food Flat Lay | Social Media Ad
prompts.contentEn:
Exploring more of Nano Banana Pro’s potential. Turning brands into scroll-stopping visuals.

Generated with Nano Banana Pro on @higgsfield_ai

- Prompt 
Ultra-wide-angle hyper-realistic top-down flat lay photography. A group of 4 real people sitting around a square dining table. The camera is pulled far back, creating significant negative space (empty floor area) around the people and the table, ensuring a clean, minimalist composition. The scene is [VIBE & ATTIRE]: The four people are dressed in [CLOTHING STYLE]. Their interactions are specific: [DESCRIBE ACTION OF EACH PERSON].

The table is a custom physical prop designed like an Instagram post: it has a solid white physical strip ONLY at the top edge and bottom edge (no white borders on left or right).
- The Top White Strip features a painted profile picture with [LOGO DESCRIPTION], username "[USERNAME]" followed by a small blue verified tick icon, and "..." on the right.
- The Bottom White Strip features painted red heart, comment, and share icons on the left, and a "Bookmark" icon on the far right.

The center of the table is painted [EXACT CENTER COLOR & HEX CODE]. The items on the table are [FOOD/OBJECTS DESCRIPTION].
IMPORTANT: ALL food items, drinks, objects, and hands interacting with them are STRICTLY CONFINED WITHIN this central [COLOR] painted area. NOTHING extends onto the white strips or outside the table boundaries. The floor background is a [FLOOR COLOR] to create visual separation. Professional studio lighting with distinct drop shadows. 8k, sharp focus.

prompts.name: 美味汉堡分解图 - 新鲜食材
prompts.content:
汉堡占据画面约90%，居中，完整可见，非微距近景特写。
清晰可读的五层：光泽布里欧修面包胚、多汁牛肉饼、融化芝士、新鲜生菜、成熟番茄。

以干净的三分之一角拍摄，突出高度、体积和结构。
背景明亮、现代、广告风格：平滑鲜艳渐变（温暖琥珀色到柔和橙色，或红色到金黄色），均匀照明，微妙的光晕过渡增加深度感。无纹理、无杂物。

灯光大胆诱人：强烈柔和主光，控制面包胚上的高光反射，肉饼和芝士上可见肉汁和光泽，蔬菜清新爽脆。
阴影柔和有方向，增加立体感但不使场景变暗。

超写实、饱和但自然、清晰对焦、高端快餐广告质感。

提示词：

将汉堡转化为干净的分解视图构图。
汉堡被分解为恰好五层，垂直悬浮，间距均匀：

布里欧修面包胚

牛肉饼

融化芝士

新鲜生菜

成熟番茄

每层保持超写实质感并对齐，保持与主角镜头相同的原始比例。

添加简约干净的标注，用细线条和清晰字体描述特点：

布里欧修面包胚 — 柔软质地，轻微烘烤色泽

牛肉饼 — 多汁、浓郁风味、完美煎烤

融化芝士 — 奶油般融化，增强鲜味

新鲜生菜 — 爽脆口感，清新平衡

成熟番茄 — 天然甜味、多汁对比

背景保持不变，略微加深以确保标注最大可读性。
灯光与第一张图片保持一致，确保视觉连贯性。
商业感、技术感、干净、一目了然。
prompts.author: 𝐌
prompts.nameEn: Delicious Burger Exploded View - Fresh Ingredients
prompts.contentEn:
The burger fills approximately 90% of the frame, centered, fully visible, not a macro close-up.
Exactly five clearly readable layers: glossy brioche bun, juicy beef patty, melted cheese, fresh lettuce, ripe tomato.

Shot at a clean three-quarter angle to emphasize height, volume, and structure.
Backdrop is bright, modern, and advertising-style: smooth vibrant gradient (warm amber → soft orange, or red → golden yellow), evenly lit, with subtle light falloff for depth. No texture, no clutter.

Lighting is bold and appetizing: strong soft key light, controlled specular highlights on the bun, visible juice and gloss on the patty and cheese, crisp freshness on vegetables.
Shadows are soft and directional, adding dimension without darkening the scene.

Ultra-realistic, saturated but natural colors, sharp focus, premium fast-food advertising quality.

Prompt:  

Transform the burger into a clean exploded-view composition.
The burger is separated into exactly five layers, floating vertically with even spacing:

Brioche bun

Beef patty

Melted cheese

Fresh lettuce

Ripe tomato

Each layer remains photorealistic and aligned, maintaining the original proportions from the hero shot.

Add minimal, clean annotations with thin lines and clear typography, describing benefits:

Brioche bun — soft texture, lightly toasted finish

Beef patty — juicy, rich flavor, perfectly seared

Melted cheese — creamy melt, enhances savoriness

Fresh lettuce — crisp bite, freshness balance

Ripe tomato — natural sweetness, juicy contrast

Background remains the same, slightly darkened to ensure maximum annotation readability.
Lighting stays consistent with the first image for visual continuity.
Commercial, technical, clean, easy to understand at a glance.

prompts.name: 美食地图：鸡肉与培根菜肴，全球美食历史
prompts.content:
Nano Banana Pro 与 GPT Image 1.5 的美食推荐提示词对比。只需给它几个食材。

<instruction>
输入：食材 = [用户选择，例如：鸡肉、培根]

步骤 1：全球分析
分析食材。
选择 4 个使用这些食材的独特国家及其著名菜肴

目标：一张展示食材的 4 种不同文化变体的 "美食地图" 网格图。

布局规则：
输出格式：2x2 网格。
每格内容：四个格子中的每一格必须展示该国的一本打开的书籍跨页。

每格内部（书籍跨页规则）：
左页（历史）：2D 复古褐色素描。菜肴的视觉时间线或插画食谱（例如 "1850 -> 1920 -> 今天"）。平面墨线绘制风格。
右页（现实）：3D 立体纸艺模型。完成的热气腾腾的菜肴从书页中立体浮现。一位来自该国的微型厨师站在书页上，旁边是巨大的食物。
一致性：四本书应该看起来像是同一系列的作品，但内容不同，反映各自文化特色。

灯光：电影感俯拍照明，突出平面左页与立体右页之间的深度差异。
输出：2x2 网格，高清，微距细节。
</instruction>
prompts.author: Gadgetify
prompts.nameEn: Culinary Atlas: Chicken & Bacon Dishes, Global Food History
prompts.contentEn:
Nano Banana Pro vs. GPT Image 1.5 for my food recommendation prompt. Just give it a couple of ingredients. 

<instruction>
Inputs: Ingredients = [User Choice, e.g., Chicken, Bacon]

Step 1: Global Analysis
Analyze the ingredients.
Select 4 Distinct Countries with a famous dish using these ingredients  

Goal: A "Culinary Atlas" Grid showing 4 different cultural variations of the ingredients.

Layout Rule:
Output Format: A 2x2 Grid.
Content per Panel: Each of the 4 panels must show a Single Open Book Spread for that specific country.

Inside Each Panel (The Book Spread Rule):
Left Page (The History): 2D Vintage Sepia Sketches. A visual timeline or illustrated recipe of the dish (e.g., "1850 -> 1920 -> Today"). Flat, ink-drawn style.
Right Page (The Reality): 3D Pop-up Diorama. The finished, steaming meal emerges physically from the page. A tiny miniature chef from that country is standing on the page next to the massive food.
Consistency: All 4 books should look like part of the same series, but with different cultural contents.

Lighting: Cinematic top-down lighting, highlighting the depth difference between the flat left page and the 3D right page.
Output: 2x2 Grid, High Definition, Macro Detail.
</instruction>

prompts.name: 日本料理：微型大阪烧与美食历史
prompts.content:
分析：提取关键食材、烹饪技巧和文化美食元素
目标：一本食材和菜肴以诱人细节呈现的食谱书
规则：
底座：一本复古食谱书，带有污渍书页和布面封面，美食历史时间线
场景：3D 微型厨房或市场场景，配有厨师和食材
细节：精细的食物纹理、蒸汽效果、烹饪器具
灯光：温暖厨房灯光，黄金时刻质感
输出：单张 4:5 图片，展示诱人细节
</instructions>
prompts.author: Gadgetify
prompts.nameEn: Japanese Cuisine: Miniature Okonomiyaki & Food History
prompts.contentEn:
Analysis: Extract key ingredients, cooking techniques, and cultural food elements
Goal: A cookbook where ingredients and dishes emerge in delicious detail
Rules:
Base: A vintage cookbook with stained pages and fabric cover, historical timeline of food
Scene: 3D Miniature kitchen or market scene with chef & ingredients
Details: Detailed food textures, steam effects, cooking implements
Lighting: Warm kitchen lighting with golden hour quality
Output: Single 4:5 image with appetizing details
</instructions>
